sevenDay.synopsis: Radar is showing a few light showers in the area this AM, but cigs are predominantly VFR. I won't rule out a shower this morning or afternoon, but rain chances ramp up during the N1, and I think cigs will fall along with the rain. IFR tomorrow morning with showers and ISOLD TS as another disturbance moves thru. Rain clears out for the PM, and cigs should improve. Slight chance of showers Friday PM, increasing for the N1. IFR sets up once again, carrying over into Saturday AM. Winds pick up Saturday as a cold front barrels thru. We'll also get another dose of showers and ISOLD TS Friday N1 thru Saturday AM. The rest of the forecast period looks just fine.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 29 APR - 05 MAY
